title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Industries Consulting Pvt Ltd!
